title: Long-Term Debt: A company plans to issue a bond with a face...
summary: Calculate bond price by discounting coupons and face value at the market rate.
prompt: A company plans to issue a bond with a face value of $1,000, coupon rate of 6%, and market interest rate of 8%. What will be the price of the bond?
solution: Bond Price = (C / (1 + r)) + (C / (1 + r)^2) + ... + (F / (1 + r)^n). Here, the bond price will be less than the face value since the market rate is higher than the coupon rate.
